title: Stam1o Supporter Server 2
description: Modpack used for Season 2 of Stam1o's Supporter Server
body: # **Stam1o Presents:** Stam1o's Supporter Server 2, Create Pack, a Minecraft modpack designed to unleash your creativity, wheter you're a builder, redstoner or casual adventurer. With a strong focus on the Create Mod for Minecraft 1.21.1, this Neoforge-based pack offers the perfect sandbox to bring your wildest ideas to life. Curated by Stam1o and the community, this pack enhances the Create experience with numerous addons. Alongside Create, you'll find a selection of quality of life and building focused mods. For builders, Chipped provides an extensive block palette complimented by an array of decoration mods. Geophilic gives the overworld a slight overhaul and with Better Archeology and Yung's Structure mods there are a ton of new structures to explore. With Create and its vast ecosystem, your imagination is the only limit. Construct sprawling factories, intricate train networks, or even a fully functional carousel! For more information regarding the server join the discord linked below.  ## Main mods are: - Create - A bunch of Addons for Create - Farmers Delight - Geophilic - Better Archeology - Yung's Structures - EMI - Chipped - Detail Mods such as Amendments, Supplementaries and more - Performance mods ## [![Nodecraft Sponsorship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef67704ea76bfadc1a950915755dcb1b72300e24.jpeg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/stam1o) ## *All mods are the property of their respective owners, massive thank you to them, without them all of this wouldn't be possible! Special thanks to oude_henky and BackupCup for helping with the pack.
